submissions.app_golden_real: <128x128 nested number array OR omit and use app_golden_code>
submissions.app_golden_imag: <128x128 nested number array OR omit and use app_golden_code>
submissions.app_golden_code:
import numpy as np
N=128
w=np.exp(2j*np.pi/N)
Q=np.array([[w**(j*k) for k in range(N)] for j in range(N)],complex)/np.sqrt(N)
golden=Q.conj().T

import numpy as np
N=21
U=np.zeros((64,64),complex)
for s in range(64):
    c=(s>>5)&1; y=s&31
    y2=(2*y%N) if (c==1 and y<N) else y
    U[(c<<5)|y2,s]=1
golden=U

_note: app_golden_code shown is an ILLUSTRATIVE form; derive U your own way. real/imag arrays are the primary artifact for the 64x64 ones; for iqft7 (128x128) building it in app_golden_code is acceptable. Only numpy/math/cmath in code.
